name: golang-github-spf13-cobra-dev
title: golang-github-spf13-cobra-dev
summary: Go library for creating powerful modern Go CLI applications
description:
Go library for creating powerful modern Go CLI applications
Cobra is a Go library providing a simple interface to create powerful
modern CLI interfaces similar to git & go tools.
.
Cobra has an exceptionally clean interface and simple design without
needless constructors or initialization methods.
.
This package contains the Cobra library for Go.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-spf13-cobra-dev because Go library for creating powerful modern Go CLI applications.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-spf13-cobra-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-spf13-cobra-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-spf13-cobra-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
